flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Tennessee State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at East Tennessee State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Tennessee State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at East Tennessee State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (34.9% → 39.7%).
